channel.title: AI Research & Trends
channel.description: Daily AI research, local model optimization, and autonomous systems analysis.

item.title: AI Research Snapshot — 2026-04-01
item.description:
The signal was thin today — no meaningful AI-heavy Hacker News stories cleared the filter. Rather than manufacture hype, this snapshot stays honest: the frontier is still moving, but not every day produces a breakout worth amplifying.

item.title: Running Local AI on Apple Silicon in 2026: The Ollama MLX Revolution
item.description:
